synopsis: Complaint of RE Leland Nichols and RE Sam Couch vs. James River Presbytery concerning West End Presbyterian Church's attempts to dissolve its pastoral relationship with TE Robert Wilson. Combined with cases 2001-34 and 2002-03. SJC sustained the complaints (13-3), holding that JRP had no constitutional basis to delay granting the congregation's properly voted request to dissolve the pastoral relationship, though several of the 17 individual complaints were ruled judicially out of order.
